message:
test(readme): cover Series scalar reductions + cumulative ops (fd90.230 / br-rprx9)

Extends readme_element_wise_operations_compiles_and_runs to cover 15
Series-level operations at fp-frame:3105-4323 that previously had no
integration coverage:

Scalar reductions:
- sum, mean, min, max, std, var, median, prod (return Scalar)
- quantile(0.5) (returns Scalar)
- abs (returns Series — element-wise)
- nunique (returns usize)

Cumulative transforms (return Series of same length):
- cumsum, cumprod, cummax, cummin

Note: count() was already minimally covered earlier in the file. The
DataFrame counterparts (df.cumsum/etc.) are tested via the existing
df.cumsum()? section.

Verified: 35 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
